component.name: LiveVideoPage

Label.text: OK pause/resume | BACK return to Home

component.script:
function init() m.videoPlayer = m.top.findNode("videoPlayer") m.statusLabel = m.top.findNode("statusLabel") m.liveLabel = m.top.findNode("liveLabel") m.streamTitle = m.top.findNode("streamTitle")
m.liveLabel.font.size = 20 m.streamTitle.font.size = 22
m.videoPlayer.observeField("state", "onVideoStateChange") end function
' ── Called when MainPage sets active=true or false ───────── sub onActiveChange() if m.top.active = true then ' Reset the close flag each time the page is activated m.top.requestClose = false startVideo() else stopVideo() end if end sub
sub startVideo() m.statusLabel.text = "Connecting to stream..." content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.url = "https://maitv-vod.lab.eyevinn.technology/VINN.mp4/master.m3u8" content.streamFormat = "hls" m.videoPlayer.content = content m.videoPlayer.control = "play" end sub
sub stopVideo() m.videoPlayer.control = "stop" m.statusLabel.text = "Stream stopped." end sub
' ── React to Video node state changes ────────────────────── sub onVideoStateChange() state = m.videoPlayer.state if state = "playing" then m.statusLabel.text = "Live — playing" else if state = "buffering" then m.statusLabel.text = "Buffering..." else if state = "error" then m.statusLabel.text = "Stream error. Please try again later." else if state = "stopped" then m.statusLabel.text = "Stream stopped." end if end sub
' ── Key handling ─────────────────────────────────────────── function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if press then if key = "back" then stopVideo() m.top.requestClose = true return true ' consume — triggers MainPage observer else if key = "OK" then if m.videoPlayer.state = "playing" then m.videoPlayer.control = "pause" else m.videoPlayer.control = "play" end if return true end if end if ' LEFT / RIGHT fall through to MainPage for nav switching return false end function
